title: Cheap-First Cascade with Escalation
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Efficiency
description: Flowchart MicroSim of cheap-first cascade with live expected-cost calculation.

learningObjectives: Implement a cheap-first cascade with appropriate escalation triggers and quantify the expected cost savings.

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Live cost calculation with cascade flowchart
keyQuestions: What is the expected cost at each cheap-pass rate?
When is the Opus tier worth adding?
Why does raising cheap-pass-rate dominate other optimizations?
commonMisconceptions: Path costs are marginal, not cumulative
Confidence threshold and pass rate are independent
